name: claude-local-marketplace
description: Personal marketplace with third-party Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: design-studio
plugins.description: A virtual design studio that assembles specialist roles for any design task. 27 slash commands covering full design workflows, Figma-native creation, design-to-code, brand kits, A/B variants, design sprints, prototyping, responsive variants, component docs, developer handoff, UX audits, and more.
